text: Several people sit at a relaxation area on a beach.
A man sitting in front of  a tray of pizza and two drinking glasses.
A plane sitting on a runway, during the day.
Plate of vegetables and pita sitting on top of a dinner table.
A couple people are playing in the water in summer.
A dog is standing on top of a sofa and looking out the window.
A dresser with a bunch of stuffed teddy bears on it.
Some very cute big and small elephants by some trees.
A MAN LAYING DOWN ON A PARK BENCH WITH A FENCE AND STATUE IN THE BACKGROUND
There is a little zebra turning his head.
